name: web-automation-framework
description: Web Automation Framework with OOP and Gherkin Style for Chronicle

scripts.test:headless: node scripts/check-playwright.js && cross-env HEADLESS=true NODE_OPTIONS='--loader ts-node/esm' cucumber-js 'src/features/**/*.feature' --import 'src/**/*.ts'
scripts.test:dev: node scripts/check-playwright.js && dotenv -e .env.dev -- cross-env NODE_OPTIONS='--loader ts-node/esm' cucumber-js 'src/features/**/*.feature' --import 'src/**/*.ts'
scripts.test:dev:headless: node scripts/check-playwright.js && dotenv -e .env.dev -- cross-env HEADLESS=true NODE_OPTIONS='--loader ts-node/esm' cucumber-js 'src/features/**/*.feature' --import 'src/**/*.ts'
scripts.test:staging: node scripts/check-playwright.js && dotenv -e .env.chronicle -- cross-env NODE_OPTIONS='--loader ts-node/esm' cucumber-js 'src/features/**/*.feature' --import 'src/**/*.ts'
scripts.test:staging:headless: node scripts/check-playwright.js && dotenv -e .env.chronicle -- cross-env HEADLESS=true NODE_OPTIONS='--loader ts-node/esm' cucumber-js 'src/features/**/*.feature' --import 'src/**/*.ts'
scripts.test:prod: node scripts/check-playwright.js && dotenv -e .env.chronicle.prod -- cross-env NODE_OPTIONS='--loader ts-node/esm' cucumber-js 'src/features/**/*.feature' --import 'src/**/*.ts'
scripts.test:prod:headless: node scripts/check-playwright.js && dotenv -e .env.chronicle.prod -- cross-env HEADLESS=true NODE_OPTIONS='--loader ts-node/esm' cucumber-js 'src/features/**/*.feature' --import 'src/**/*.ts'

scripts.test:p0:staging: node scripts/check-playwright.js && dotenv -e .env.chronicle -- cross-env NODE_OPTIONS='--loader ts-node/esm' cucumber-js 'src/features/**/*.feature' --import 'src/**/*.ts' --tags '@p0'
scripts.test:p0:prod: node scripts/check-playwright.js && dotenv -e .env.chronicle.prod -- cross-env NODE_OPTIONS='--loader ts-node/esm' cucumber-js 'src/features/**/*.feature' --import 'src/**/*.ts' --tags '@p0'
scripts.test:p0:prod:headless: node scripts/check-playwright.js && dotenv -e .env.chronicle.prod -- cross-env HEADLESS=true NODE_OPTIONS='--loader ts-node/esm' cucumber-js 'src/features/**/*.feature' --import 'src/**/*.ts' --tags '@p0'

scripts.test:interment:staging: node scripts/check-playwright.js && dotenv -e .env.chronicle -- cross-env NODE_OPTIONS='--loader ts-node/esm' cucumber-js 'src/features/**/*.feature' --import 'src/**/*.ts' --tags '@interment'

scripts.test:advanced-search-plot: node scripts/check-playwright.js && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS='--loader ts-node/esm' cucumber-js 'src/features/**/*.feature' --import 'src/**/*.ts' --tags '@advanced-search-plot'
scripts.test:parallel: node scripts/check-playwright.js && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS='--loader ts-node/esm' cucumber-js 'src/features/**/*.feature' --import 'src/**/*.ts' --parallel 3
scripts.test:debug: node scripts/check-playwright.js && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS='--loader ts-node/esm' cucumber-js 'src/features/**/*.feature' --import 'src/**/*.ts' --format 'html:cucumber-report.html'
